Package org.eventb.internal.ui.preferences

Class EventBEditorPreferencePage

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.DialogPage
org.eclipse.jface.preference.PreferencePage
org.eclipse.jface.preference.FieldEditorPreferencePage
org.eventb.internal.ui.preferences.EventBEditorPreferencePage
All Implemented Interfaces:
EventListener, org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.IDialogPage, org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.IMessageProvider, org.eclipse.jface.preference.IPreferencePage, org.eclipse.jface.util.IPropertyChangeListener, org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchPreferencePage
Direct Known Subclasses:
ContextEditorPreferencePage, MachineEditorPreferencePage
public abstract class EventBEditorPreferencePage extends org.eclipse.jface.preference.FieldEditorPreferencePage implements org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchPreferencePage

  • Constructor Details

    • EventBEditorPreferencePage

      public EventBEditorPreferencePage(IEditorPagesPreference preference, String description, String pagesFieldName, String pagesFieldDescription)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      preference - the editor pages preference IEditorPagesPreference.
      description - the string description of the preference page.
      pagesFieldName - the preference key for the list of selected pages.
      pagesFieldDescription - the string description of the list of selected pages.

  • Method Details

    • createFieldEditors

      public void createFieldEditors()
      Creates the field editor selected pages field using TwoListSelectionEditor. The field editor knows how to save and restore itself.

      The editor are created as a part of a tab folder.

    • init

      public void init(org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbench workbench)
      Specified by:
      init in interface org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchPreferencePage
